name: Hevolution announced more than $400M committed to healthspan science
summary: Hevolution Foundation announced more than $400 million committed to healthspan science within 21 months, including large awards for aging biology and geroscience programs.
significance_note: Marks substantial dedicated funding infrastructure for geroscience and healthspan research. It is field activity, not evidence that any intervention improves aging outcomes.

surface_routing.rationale: Major funder field activity should be considered in State of the Field review as context, while leaving evidence and outlook surfaces unchanged.
